Name: Copper Cloud Staff
Description: A sturdy bronze staff that produces a whooshing sound when swung, ideal for close-range combat.

Name: Hundred Performances Coin-Lined Robe
Description: A finely crafted battle armor that provides powerful defense and resistance against poison damage.

Name: Heavenly Thunder Strike
Description: Summons heavenly thunder to strike enemies, dealing large-area lightning damage.

Name: Flame Dance
Description: Unleashes a fiery dance technique, enveloping enemies in scorching flames.

Name: Sun Wukong
Description: The protagonist, possessing the Seventy-Two Transformations and the ability to ride the clouds, a champion of justice.

Name: Silver Horn King
Description: One of the powerful demon kings, skilled at manipulating various magical treasures with exceptionally high combat prowess.
